title: Electrochemical cell for gas-phase reactant in liquid environment
abstract: The invention is directed to an electrochemical cell for production of chemicals from a gas-phase reactant in a liquid environment. The electrochemical cell has a membrane electrode assembly configuration and is comprised of an anode, an ion exchange membrane and a cathode. The membrane electrode assembly is in direct contact with a liquid solution to facilitate extraction and handling of the produced chemicals, and the gas reactant is delivered through the liquid to the membrane electrode assembly. The present invention relates to a process and electrochemical cell for use in the synthesis of chemicals. The present invention relates to the electrocatalysts used and their incorporation into a membrane electrode assembly, MEA. The present invention also relates to the electrodes used in a membrane electrode assembly, in particular the gas diffusion layer, and a method for transport of gas-phase reactants into a liquid-immersed membrane electrode assembly.
claims:
Claims Claims : 1. An apparatus or device producing a chemical compound by electrochemical means, comprised of one or more electrochemical cells (1) in the membrane-electrode assembly configuration comprising at least one ion exchange membrane (4), at least one cathode with suitable catalysts (5, 6), at least one anode with suitable catalysts (2,3), at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the cathode side (6) and at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the anode side (2), wherein the cathode or anode or both sides of the cell are at least partly immersed in a liquid and at least one gas reactant is fed to the cathode or anode or both, wherein a gas disperser (15) is placed within 1 cm of the cathode or anode or both sides of the cells. 2. The apparatus with the gas disperser (15) of claim 1 wherein the gas is directed into the gas diffusion layer (2, 6) and through to the catalyst layer (3, 5) . 3. The apparatus or device of claims 1-2 wherein the chemical compound is hydrogen peroxide produced by oxygen reduction at the cathode side of the cell. 4. The apparatus or device of claims 1-3 wherein the oxygen source is air, oxygen extracted from air or an oxygen supply. 5. The apparatus or device of claims 1-4 wherein the liquid is an aqueous solution. 6. The apparatus or device of claims 1-4 wherein the liquid is flowing . 7. The apparatus or device of claims 1-4 wherein the cathode is a gas diffusion electrode. 8. The apparatus with the gas diffusion electrode of claim 7 wherein the cathode catalyst is chosen from the group including silver, carbon, gold, Pt-Au, Pd-Au, Pt-Hg, Pd-Hg, Ag-Hg, Cu-Hg, Co-containing materials, graphene or other carbon-based structures, graphene doped with transition or post-transition metals, porphyrins containing transition metals or post-transition metals or any combinations thereof 9. The apparatus or device of claims 1-4 wherein the anode catalyst is chosen from the group including iridium, ruthenium, platinum, gold or mixtures thereof and is applied as a catalyst-coated membrane. 10. An apparatus or device producing a chemical compound by electrochemical means, comprised of one or more electrochemical cells (1) in the membrane-electrode assembly configuration comprising at least one ion exchange membrane (4), at least one cathode with suitable catalysts (5, 6), at least one anode with suitable catalysts (2,3), at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the cathode side (6) and at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the anode side (2), wherein the cathode or anode or both sides of the cell are at least partly immersed in a liquid and at least one gas reactant is fed to the cathode or anode or both, wherein the membrane is coated with a suitable catalyst material for cathode reaction or anode reaction or both, forming a catalyst coated membrane, and wherein the cathode reaction is oxygen reduction to hydrogen peroxide. 11. The apparatus with the catalyst-coated membrane of claim 10 wherein the cathode catalyst is chosen from the group including silver, carbon, gold, Pt-Au, Pd-Au, Pt-Hg, Pd-Hg, Ag-Hg, Cu-Hg, Co-containing materials, graphene or other carbon-based structures, graphene doped with transition or post-transition metals, porphyrins containing transition metals or post-transition metals or any combinations thereof 12. An apparatus or device producing a chemical compound by electrochemical means, comprised of one or more electrochemical cells (1) in the membrane-electrode assembly configuration comprising at least one ion exchange membrane (4), at least one cathode with suitable catalysts (5, 6), at least one anode with suitable catalysts (2,3), at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the cathode side (6) and at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the anode side (2), wherein the cathode or anode or both sides of the cell are at least partly immersed in a liquid and at least one gas reactant is fed to the cathode or anode or both, whereby the gas supplied to the electrochemical cell contains oxygen, and oxygen is fed into 

 the electrochemical cell and recirculated for its utilization in the same or other cells which may be connected in parallel or in series. 13. An apparatus or device producing a chemical compound by electrochemical means, comprised of one or more electrochemical cells (1) in the membrane-electrode assembly configuration comprising at least one ion exchange membrane (4), at least one cathode with suitable catalysts (5, 6), at least one anode with suitable catalysts (2,3), at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the cathode side (6) and at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the anode side (2), wherein the cathode or anode or both sides of the cell are at least partly immersed in a liquid and at least one gas reactant is fed to the cathode or anode or both, and wherein the electrochemically synthesized hydrogen peroxide is introduced locally into a water line (19) or a suitable reservoir (20) . 14. The apparatus or device according to claim 13, where the synthesized hydrogen peroxide is vaporized in order to provide air and surface disinfection. 15. The apparatus or device according to claim 13, where the synthesized hydrogen peroxide is combined with ultra-violet light or ozone in order to facilitate the formation of hydroxyl radicals. 16. Method for producing a chemical compound by electrochemical means using one or more electrochemical cells (1) in the membrane-electrode assembly configuration comprising at least one ion exchange membrane (4), at least one cathode with suitable catalysts (5, 6) , at least one anode with suitable catalysts (2,3), at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the cathode side (6) and at least one gas diffusion layer or current collector on the anode side (2), wherein the cathode or anode or both sides of the cell are at least partly immersed in a liquid, characterized in that a gas disperser (15) is located in close vicinity to the electrode (s) and feeds the reactant gas through the liquid directly to the cathode or anode or both sides of the cells .
